description_long: This is a medium-sized pumpkin with a rounded, slightly flattened shape and a mottled exterior featuring green, yellow, and pale orange hues. The surface is covered in irregular, speckled patterns, giving it a natural, rustic appearance. At the top, a short, thick, and slightly twisted stem is visible, showing some dried, woody texture. The bottom of the pumpkin is more yellowish and features a small, circular scar where it was attached to the vine. The skin appears hard and matte, with subtle ridges and shallow grooves radiating from the stem. There are no visible carvings, facial features, or decorative accessories on its surface.
description: A mottled green and yellow pumpkin with a short, woody stem and a hard, matte surface. The skin is speckled and slightly ridged, with no carvings or decorations.
description_view_0: Top view showing the stem and radiating grooves, with green and yellow mottling most prominent.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rounded shape and the stem protruding to the left, with a mix of green and yellow coloration.
description_view_2: Bottom view displaying the yellowish base and the small circular scar where the pumpkin was attached to the vine.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the stem visible on the right, showing more of the green speckled surface.
